vibe_report.summary: A calm, family-friendly Japandi interior that balances warm neutrals, low-profile furniture, and layered natural textures. Prioritize a cozy work corner in the bedroom while keeping sightlines clean across the open-plan living, dining, and kitchen. Light is soft and directional from windows; materials focus on light oak, warm walnut accents, hand-glazed ceramics, woven pendants, and tactile textiles.
vibe_report.palette_rationale: Use the warm_neutral palette to create a cohesive, family-ready backdrop: warm off-white surfaces (#EDE6DE) as base, pale sand oak (#D2BFA3) for primary woodwork, tan accents (#B58E61) for upholstery and ceramics, deeper walnut (#8A6E52) as anchor for occasional furniture, muted green foliage (#6A736A) for biophilic moments, and charcoal (#2F3230) for minimal metal details. Keep contrast gentle — mid-contrast tonal layering rather than stark black/white.
vibe_report.lighting_mood: Soft ambient daylight with directional window pulls that create warm, sculpted shadows. Use low-level practical lamps and a woven pendant over the dining table for evening warmth. Avoid hard, top-down commercial lighting: keep all highlights plausible from visible windows and fixtures.
materials: light oak veneer — tabletops, shelving, flooring accents
warm walnut — low coffee table and occasional accents
linen and cotton — sofa and cushions
natural seagrass/woven fibers — pendant and poufs
matte black steel — desk legs and small hardware
textures: soft low-pile wool rug with subtle weave
furniture_language: slim tapered legs or plinth bases
functional, decluttered surfaces for family use
styling_rules: limit tabletop decor to 2–3 ceramic vessels or a single sculptural vase
keep color accents confined to tan and muted green — no bright primary colors
balance low furniture with vertical plant elements to guide sightlines
place family-work corner in bedroom with clean cable management and soft task lighting
use layered rugs/poufs in reading nook for tactile warmth
avoid: high-gloss lacquer or slick chrome finishes
busy patterns and saturated color pops
large, tall sofas that block sightlines in the open-plan

room_guidance.headline: Calm low-profile living hub visible from dining & kitchen
room_guidance.guidance: Stage a low, pale-oat linen sofa facing toward the bay window and subtly angled toward the dining table to foster connection. Keep coffee table and rug proportions low and organic. Add a medium tall plant near the bay window for vertical balance. Limit decor to two ceramic vessels and a stack of family books. Ensure visual continuity with the dining set and pendant.
must_include: low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3), single long seat cushion, no visible legs
textured wool rug — warm oatmeal (#EDE6DE) with subtle charcoal linear weave (#2F3230), 8x10ft, low pile
low organic coffee table — organic-shaped low coffee table, solid walnut stained warm brown (#8A6E52), matte finish, curved edges
tall potted fiddle-leaf fig — matte terra-cotta pot in muted green (#6A736A), height ~5ft
must_avoid: tall, bulky sofas that obstruct sightlines
bright colored throw cushions
large floor lamps that block the opening to Dine

room_guidance.headline: Inviting Japandi dining nook with woven pendant focal
room_guidance.guidance: Center a round light-oak dining table beneath an oversized woven pendant. Keep seating slim and textured in neutral linen; stage the tabletop with a single sculptural hand-glazed vase and one linen place setting. The pendant should read as the primary focal point visible from the living area.
must_include: round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish
oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser
one small ceramic vase (tan) and linen napkin styling
must_avoid: high-gloss pendant finishes
glass or metallic chandeliers that break the Japandi read

room_guidance.headline: Compact, tactile kitchen visible to dining & living
room_guidance.guidance: Keep counters minimal and tactile — pale oak shelving or drawer fronts, matte black hardware, and one small grouping of ceramic wares. Ensure window light above the sink is the primary highlight; any pendant or fixture must align with the woven, warm aesthetic of the dining pendant. Keep appliances unobtrusive.
must_include: visible edge of round light-oak dining table spec (see shared objects)
small ceramic canister group in tan (#B58E61) near the sink
must_avoid: stainless-steel reflections that read cold
overhead fluorescent-style fixtures

room_guidance.headline: Serene bedroom with a cozy standing-desk corner for working parents
room_guidance.guidance: Keep the bed low and simple, with warm linen bedding. Place the standing desk and bookshelf in a dedicated corner that reads as a calm work nook — desk faces the interior, with soft task lamp and cable management. Add a small woven pouf or floor cushion for a low reading moment.
must_include: compact standing desk — pale oak tabletop (#D2BFA3), black matte steel legs (#2F3230), 48in width, slim profile
open 5-shelf light oak bookshelf — light oak finish (#D2BFA3), slim vertical form, matte finish
must_avoid: cluttered desk with many monitors or bright stickers
high-throne chairs that break low Japandi scale

room_guidance.headline: Small spa-like bathroom with frosted window and natural tile
room_guidance.guidance: Use warm, textured tile or microcement in a pale sand tone, simple matte black fixtures, and a single potted plant by the tub. Keep the palette consistent with the rest of the home and minimize patterned surfaces.
must_include: matte black fixtures (#2F3230)
pale sand tile or microcement (#D2BFA3)
must_avoid: bright white clinical tiles
shiny chrome hardware

warnings: Open-plan sightlines require strict furniture color consistency — any mismatch will be noticeable
Kitchen and bathroom dimensions were estimated; verify placement relative to windows before final staging

overall_mood: Warm minimal Japandi — calm, textural, family-friendly
global_style_notes: Preserve architecture and sightlines: keep low furniture and horizontal emphasis to maintain openness.
Derive all directional light from visible windows and the woven pendant/practical lamps only.
Keep props minimal and hand-made in feel: ceramics, woven textiles, a small book stack, one tray.
negative_prompt: no color inconsistency between rooms, no mismatched furniture across sightlines, blur, distort, low quality, warped architecture, flicker, unstable camera, unrealistic lighting, muddy shadows, layout drift

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Soft morning directional light from bay window; boost midtones slightly for readability while preserving sculpted shadows. Use warm practical lamp for evening shots.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Wide open-plan living area with low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3), single long seat cushion, no visible legs — positioned facing bay window. Place textured wool rug — warm oatmeal (#EDE6DE) with subtle charcoal linear weave (#2F3230), 8x10ft, low pile — centered under seating. Low organic coffee table — organic-shaped low coffee table, solid walnut stained warm brown (#8A6E52), matte finish, curved edges — in front of sofa with two ceramic vessels. Tall potted fiddle-leaf fig — matte terra-cotta pot in muted green (#6A736A), ~5ft — near the bay. Ensure the round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish — and oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser — are visible across the opening to the dining nook. Keep wall art minimal and aligned to sofa height. Maintain believable scale and verticals; do not add objects that obstruct the circulation path to the kitchen.
room_plans.video_prompt: Wide interior shot with a slow and smooth dolly in, camera moves forward from the dining toward the living area revealing layered textures, directional window light shifts across textiles and plants, shadows crawl gently, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic
must_include: low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3), single long seat cushion, no visible legs
textured wool rug — warm oatmeal (#EDE6DE) with subtle charcoal linear weave (#2F3230), 8x10ft, low pile
low organic coffee table — organic-shaped low coffee table, solid walnut stained warm brown (#8A6E52), matte finish, curved edges
tall potted fiddle-leaf fig — matte terra-cotta pot in muted green (#6A736A), height ~5ft
round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish
oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser
must_avoid: sofa color or finish that deviates from specified pale oat linen
adding extra large furniture that alters the open-plan sightline

room_plans.lighting_instruction: High natural light from bay-style multi-pane window; highlight woven pendant as the main practical light for evening frames. Keep reflections soft and warm.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Compact dining nook with round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish — centered beneath oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser — hung approximately 30in above tabletop. Four slim dining chairs with textured neutral linen upholstery and light oak legs. Table staged with a single hand-glazed tan ceramic vase and one linen place setting. From camera angle include partial view of low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3), single long seat cushion, no visible legs — and the textured wool rug at the edge of frame to preserve cross-room continuity. Ensure window mullions read natural and verticals are true.
room_plans.video_prompt: Super smooth camera glides horizontally from right to left, slow truck revealing table and pendant while light shifts gently across the tabletop, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic
must_include: round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish
oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser
one hand-glazed tan ceramic vase
must_avoid: pendants or fixtures that clash in material or color with the woven seagrass pendant
over-decorating the tabletop with many small objects

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Directional window light above counter as primary source; maintain soft ambient fill from dining pendant when visible. Keep countertop highlights controlled.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small tactile kitchen plane with pale oak lower cabinets or open shelving (light oak veneer #D2BFA3), matte black hardware (#2F3230), and a small window/vent above the counter. Keep counters clear except for a small ceramic canister group in tan (#B58E61) and a single wooden cutting board. From the kitchen-angle include partial sightline to round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish — and the edge of low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3). Do not introduce reflective stainless surfaces that dominate the frame.
room_plans.video_prompt: Very slow truck right, camera slides laterally across the compact kitchen toward the dining nook, directional window light moves across textured surfaces, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic
must_include: small ceramic canister group in tan (#B58E61)
round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish
must_avoid: bright appliance reflections or added glossy surfaces
extra hanging lights that compete with the woven pendant

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Medium soft daylight from single exterior window; add a warm task lamp at the standing desk for evening shots. Keep shadows soft and pleasant.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Serene bedroom with low platform bed, warm linen bedding in off-white (#EDE6DE) and a soft tan throw. Work corner contains compact standing desk — pale oak tabletop (#D2BFA3), black matte steel legs (#2F3230), 48in width, slim profile — paired with a small warm LED task lamp. Nearby, open 5-shelf light oak bookshelf — light oak finish (#D2BFA3), slim vertical form, matte finish — holds neatly arranged books, a small ceramic vessel, and a woven pouf. Keep desk cables hidden and avoid large monitors; emphasize calm and usable family work corner.
room_plans.video_prompt: Super smooth camera travels in a short arc around the bedroom work corner, gentle orbital pan keeping the desk and bookshelf centered, warm lamp illumination engages as daylight softens, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic
must_include: compact standing desk — pale oak tabletop (#D2BFA3), black matte steel legs (#2F3230), 48in width, slim profile
open 5-shelf light oak bookshelf — light oak finish (#D2BFA3), slim vertical form, matte finish
must_avoid: desktop clutter and multiple monitors
office task chairs that break the low Japandi aesthetic

room_plans.lighting_instruction: Low natural light from frosted window; supplement with warm wall sconce above vanity for evening. Retain moody yet readable shadows.
room_plans.dalle_scene_details: Small spa-like bathroom with pale sand microcement or tile (#D2BFA3), matte black fixtures (#2F3230), and a frosted window near the tub. Add a single potted plant on a low stool and a folded linen towel in warm tan (#B58E61). Keep styling minimal and cohesive with the home's palette; avoid glossy ceramic subway tiles or chrome fixtures.
room_plans.video_prompt: Very slow dolly out revealing bathroom from doorway, soft directional light through frosted window, shadows remain stable, consistent exposure, cinematic, photorealistic
must_include: matte black fixtures (#2F3230)
pale sand tile or microcement (#D2BFA3)
must_avoid: clinical white tiles or shiny chrome hardware
excessive decorative items on counters

shared_objects.appearance_spec: low-profile 3-seater sofa — pale oat linen upholstery (#EDE6DE), low wooden plinth base in light oak (#D2BFA3), single long seat cushion, no visible legs
round light-oak dining table — round 48in diameter, light oak veneer tabletop (#D2BFA3), slim tapered legs, matte finish
oversized woven pendant — dome-shaped woven seagrass pendant, warm tan (#B58E61), diameter 28in, interior white diffuser
low organic coffee table — organic-shaped low coffee table, solid walnut stained warm brown (#8A6E52), matte finish, curved edges
textured wool rug — warm oatmeal (#EDE6DE) with subtle charcoal linear weave (#2F3230), 8x10ft, low pile
tall potted fiddle-leaf fig — matte terra-cotta pot in muted green (#6A736A), height ~5ft
compact standing desk — pale oak tabletop (#D2BFA3), black matte steel legs (#2F3230), 48in width, slim profile
open 5-shelf light oak bookshelf — light oak finish (#D2BFA3), slim vertical form, matte finish

warnings: Confirm actual locations of doors/windows against the floor plan before finalizing camera paths — some room dimensions were estimated by ML.
Because the living/dining/kitchen share open sightlines, any deviation in material or color across rooms will be highly visible; adhere strictly to the shared_objects appearance_spec.
For video passes, run one editorial image-pass (AutoHDR editorial correction) on each representative still before generating the 5s Fal clips to ensure verticals and window pulls are correct.
